title: CobbleHats - Now Craftable !
description: Add various Pokémon-themed hats to your game!
body:
# Add various Pokémon-themed hats to your game!
**Now craftable !**

**All the recipes are in the _ressourcepack_ you will download.**
**You can also use Roughly Enough Items (REI) and look for the carved pumpkin recipes**

## **Important** : Don't forget to add the file both to your _ressourcespack_ AND _datapack_ folder of your world !

![Shiny Update !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02e75d461113c2763b6baf3d80fb573589f4ac85.png)


### Dependencies
**No mods are required in order for Cobblehats to work, BUT **Continuity**  is higly recommended, if you don't have it installed, hats like the Umbreon Cap won't have emissive texture.**



_Join the Official Cobblemon server on discord, look for the addon page of Cobblehats if you have an issue._
